conflict: CommonFrame's bankruptcy turns victory into a mass-care crisis by abandoning the bargain bodies already in circulation with no maintenance path and no legal clarity.
consequence: The struggle shifts from proving wrongdoing to keeping living overlap bodies and poor renters alive through system failure.
must_land_beats: Show why a legal win can produce immediate material disaster.
Transform the old ferry terminal into an emergency triage site through collective action.
Bring Celia into the new order as a displaced technician of the old one.
End with Mira choosing care over a cleaner public narrative.
